title: The Ledger Entry
description: Mixing, selling, and debunking records all point toward a single pair. Deduce what potion they produce.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing3 and ing6, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing3=R- (ing3 has R-), ing6=R+ (ing6 has R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing3=G+ (ing3 has G+), ing6=G- (ing6 has G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing3=B+ (ing3 has B+), ing6=B+ (ing6 has B+)
      → SAME sign + → B+ resolves.
